name: Dominik Modrzejewski
title: Salesforce B2C Solution Architect
summary: Salesforce-certified B2C Solution Architect with 15+ years of experience driving MarTech and digital transformation across fintech, gaming, and e-commerce. Delivers scalable customer data and activation architectures across Salesforce Data 360, Marketing Cloud, and core Salesforce platform, with deep expertise in enterprise integrations and governed data layers.

experience.title: Salesforce Data 360 Architect
experience.description: Designed and delivered enterprise CDP and data activation solutions across Salesforce Data 360, Marketing Cloud, and Salesforce CRM for retail and e-commerce clients.
highlights: Designed a scalable enterprise CDP solution unifying about 60M customer records in Salesforce Data 360
Integrated Databricks, SAP, Salesforce CRM, and Marketing Cloud into a governed activation architecture
Defined atomic to aggregate to CRM-ready data layers for analytics and personalization
Led a cross-functional delivery team of 5 to drive implementation and adoption

experience.title: Salesforce Solution Architect
experience.description: Architected and delivered MarTech capabilities spanning Service Cloud, Marketing Cloud Engagement, Marketing Cloud Personalization, and Data 360 across retail and digital channels.
highlights: Built the Salesforce foundation for both e-commerce and retail channels
Implemented zero-copy federation between Snowflake and Salesforce Data 360 for about 4M customers
Defined data models and API integrations enabling a unified customer view and cross-channel activation
Supported launch of a loyalty program on Salesforce Loyalty Cloud, reaching about 20% penetration in year one
Directed a cross-functional team of 4 to deliver scalable and compliant solutions

experience.title: Digital Transformation Consultant and Lead
experience.company: GOG (CD Projekt Group), PayPal, MCI Capital, others
experience.description: Advised leadership teams and delivered digital transformation initiatives across fintech, e-commerce, and online services.
highlights: Advised C-level stakeholders across the US, UK, Poland, Germany, Russia, China, and France
Designed and delivered CRM and marketing automation programs using HubSpot and custom solutions
Supported customer bases from 1M to 10M+ users with omnichannel personalization and campaign automation
Led delivery teams ranging from small squads to 30+ members

experience.title: Marketing and Communications Manager
experience.description: Led strategic marketing and digital initiatives in banking, working across product, IT, data, and sales teams.
highlights: Drove go-to-market strategy for the IKO mobile banking app, reaching about 20% adoption of a 6.5M customer base at launch
Co-led rollout of the BLIK payment system, securing about 35% of Poland's payment acceptance network
Supported international expansion into Germany and the Czech Republic for enterprise clients
Supervised a dedicated marketing team and cross-functional collaboration
